title: 修复错误将chunk_size更新为chunks_number的问题
body:
KnowledgeBaseManager类中，更新File表的chunk_number字段使用的方法update_chunks_number存在sql语句错误。
实际为"UPDATE File SET chunk_size = %s WHERE file_id = %s"。这会错误地修改chunk_size，导致chunk_size和chunks_number值相同。

同时，在文件插入向量数据库结束后，原代码会有针对chunks_number等信息的统一修改。

所以可以将insert_files_server.py中，process_data中对chunks_number做的更新语句：mysql_client.update_chunks_number(local_file.file_id, chunks_number)进行删除。
修改后，文件上传成功后chunks_number和chunk_size的值完全正确。

step_plan.summary: Fix the SQL bug in KnowledgeBaseManager.update_chunks_number so it updates File.chunks_number (not chunk_size), and remove the redundant mysql_client.update_chunks_number(...) call from process_data to avoid duplicate/incorrect intermediate writes.

steps.operation: Fix SQL in update_chunks_number to update correct column
steps.reason: The current SQL mistakenly updates the chunk_size column ("UPDATE File SET chunk_size = %s WHERE file_id = %s") causing chunk_size to be overwritten with the chunks count. Change the SQL to update the chunks_number column ("UPDATE File SET chunks_number = %s WHERE file_id = %s") so the method behaves according to its name and the schema.
steps.side_effects: Corrects the underlying bug for any callers of update_chunks_number. Tests should verify that chunk_size (set at file creation) remains unchanged and chunks_number is stored correctly. If any other code incorrectly relied on the old buggy behavior (writing chunks_count into chunk_size), that code will now observe the correct columns and may need adjustment. No DB schema changes required; API (method signature) remains the same.

steps.operation: Remove redundant intermediate DB update of chunks_number
steps.reason: process_data currently calls mysql_client.update_chunks_number(local_file.file_id, chunks_number) immediately after vector insertion, but check_and_process later persists chunks_number in a single final UPDATE. Removing this redundant call avoids an extra write (and avoided dependency on the buggy method prior to the fix) and centralizes persistence of chunks_number in check_and_process.
steps.side_effects: Reduces redundant DB writes and potential race conditions; ensure that the final check_and_process still always executes to persist chunks_number on success. Tests should confirm that after a successful upload the File row contains the correct chunks_number and chunk_size values. If any other logic expects chunks_number to be available immediately after process_data returns (before check_and_process runs), that expectation must be updated. No API or schema changes.
